name: vanillagrid
description: A tiny dependency-free data grid for the web
author: Simon Waldherr

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run minify
scripts.minify: terser vanillagrid.js --compress --mangle --comments '/^!/' --output dist/vanillagrid.min.js && cleancss -o dist/vanillagrid.min.css vanillagrid.css && terser vg-pivot-d3.js --compress --mangle --comments '/^!/' --output dist/vg-pivot-d3.min.js && cleancss -o dist/vg-pivot-d3.min.css vg-pivot-d3.css
scripts.check: node --check vanillagrid.js && node --check vg-pivot-d3.js && node --check scripts/serve.js
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run check
